title: Dark Peppery British Victoria Sponge Cake
description: Moist, pillowy sponge cake infused with pepper and deep-fried to perfection with dark chocolate.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: gluten-free flour can be used as a substitute

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, coconut sugar, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the non-dairy milk, apple cider vinegar, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Add the vegan egg replacement and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Using a piping bag, pipe the batter into the preheated oil in a continuous loop.
Fry the cake for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the cake from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Melt the dark chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments.
Dip the top of the cake into the melted chocolate and let set before serving.
Repeat the process to create a second cake and sandwich the two cakes together with the remaining chocolate.
